brand.name: ATMAN
brand.description: Luxury live music band for high-end weddings, destination weddings, corporate events, and private celebrations.
brand.tone: Cinematic, elegant, modern, soulful, premium luxury

layouts.spacing: Generous spacing. Use py-24 to py-32 for section padding. gap-8 to gap-12 for grids.
layouts.grid: Bento or asymmetric grids for Gallery and Services. Break standard symmetry to create a high-end editorial feel.
layouts.cards: Minimalist dark cards (bg-[#1E1E1E]), sharp edges (rounded-none or max rounded-sm), subtle 1px border of #C9A227/20.

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: For sticky navbar: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#121212]/75 border-b border-[#C9A227]/20. DO NOT use fully transparent backgrounds anywhere over images.
visual_enhancers.glow_effects: Gold CTAs should have a soft ambient glow: shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(201,162,39,0.3)] hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(201,162,39,0.6)].
visual_enhancers.overlays: Use gradient overlays on background images: bg-gradient-to-b from-[#121212]/40 via-[#121212]/70 to-[#121212] to ensure text contrast.

motion.hero: Subtle scale-up animation on the background image (1.05 to 1.0 over 10s). Slow fade-up for headings.
motion.scroll: Parallax effect on hero and about images. Staggered fade-up for services cards using framer-motion.
motion.hover: Images in gallery should scale up slightly (scale-105) with long duration (duration-500). Buttons pulse and increase glow.

components.navbar: Sticky, glassmorphism, logo on left (elegant 'A' and 'ATMAN'), links center, CTA right. Must have data-testid attributes.
components.hero: Full height (min-h-screen). Background image of drumset with gold lights. Overlay to ensure text readability. 'Music That Touches The Soul'. Pill-shaped genre indicators (Bollywood, Sufi, Rock) floating elegantly. Animated scroll indicator at bottom.

buttons.primary: bg-[#C9A227] text-[#121212] font-semibold py-3 px-8 rounded-full shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(201,162,39,0.4)] hover:shadow-[0_0_25px_rgba(201,162,39,0.8)] transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#C9A227] text-[#C9A227] py-3 px-8 rounded-full hover:bg-[#C9A227]/10 transition-colors

components.services_cards: Dark background (#1E1E1E), sharp edges, gold accents on hover. Layout: 1x4 or 2x2 grid.
components.genres_section: Elegant cards or large pills for Bollywood, Sufi, and Rock genres. Use typography and subtle borders.
components.gallery: Masonry or Bento grid of premium instrument shots. Strictly no faces.
components.performances: Clean YouTube embedded iframes with subtle gold borders or glow.
components.booking_form: Minimalist inputs with bottom borders only, or dark filled inputs with gold focus rings. focus:ring-[#C9A227]. Submit button should have gold glow.
components.testimonials: Elegant carousel with gold quotation marks. High contrast text.
components.footer: Tasteful, minimalistic. Contact placeholders and social links (Instagram/YouTube).

hero_background.description: Dramatic backlit drum set on stage with golden lighting.

about_image.description: Close up of an acoustic guitar in warm, dramatic lighting.

gallery_1.description: Close up of a piano in cinematic dark lighting.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use framer-motion for all scroll and entrance animations.
Import Google Fonts: Cinzel and Poppins.
Ensure contrast is high between text and backgrounds. Use gradient overlays on background images.
DO NOT use generic icons for the logo. Style the letter 'A' elegantly with Cinzel font.
DO NOT use placeholder images. Use only the provided image_urls. If more are needed, reuse them creatively or build UI without imagery.
For the YouTube performances, use clean embedded iframes with subtle gold borders or shadows.
DO NOT make backgrounds fully transparent under text. Use glassmorphism or dark overlays.
Ensure to include `data-testid` on all buttons, links, and form inputs for testing.
You are working with .js files, NOT .tsx files. Use standard React JSX syntax without TypeScript.
Use lucide-react for essential icons (like scroll arrows or social media).
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Avoid generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts. Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements.
You MUST NOT center align the app container. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text.
Always use modern button styles with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
Use sonner for toasts, typically imported from components/ui/sonner.
